title: Intense Nutty Australian Lentils Skewers
description: A plant-based Australian dish featuring coriander and beurre-monte, perfect for a date night, with a nutty and snappy flavor profile.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a medium saucepan, bring 2 cups of water to a boil.
Add the red lentils, reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes or until tender.
In a small saucepan, toast the coriander seeds over medium heat for 2-3 minutes or until fragrant.
Grind the toasted coriander seeds into a powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
In a large bowl, whisk together the beurre-monte, olive oil, ground coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked lentils, chopped onion, and minced garlic to the bowl and stir until combined.
Thread the lentil mixture, dates, and onion onto the bamboo skewers.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
